title: PublicReport
description: A DOI public investigation report — the agency's core work product. As New York City's Inspector General, DOI issues public reports of its investigative findings and reform recommendations. NO structured Open Data twin exists: these reports are published only as PDFs under nyc.gov/assets/doi/reports/pdf/<year>/. This schema models the metadata DOI already exposes on its Reports pages so the corpus can be indexed, searched, and referenced.

reportId.description: Stable identifier (e.g. derived from the PDF filename).

title.description: Report title as shown on the DOI Reports page.

year.description: Report year (matches the PDF path segment).

unit.description: Issuing DOI unit or Office of the Inspector General (e.g. OIG-NYPD, OIG-DOE).

subjectAgency.description: City agency or entity investigated (e.g. NYCHA, ACS, DOE).

pdfUrl.description: Direct link to the report PDF under /assets/doi/reports/pdf/.

recommendationCount.description: Number of reform recommendations issued in the report.

arrestsReferenced.description: Arrests referenced in the report, where stated.
